_schemaNote: Sub-style = Origin x Class cross product (GDD §2). Keyed [origin_id][class_id]. archetype: Vanguard=warrior/Tank, Strategist=mage/Support, Duelist=thief/DPS.

warrior.name: Arcane Aegis
warrior.mechanic: Projects clean geometric blue-light shields to lock down lanes.
warrior.silhouette: Bulky tank volume with large arm/forearm shield emitters
warrior.vfx: Transparent geometric blue-light shield meshes — emissive fresnel + scroll pattern (overdraw-watch)

mage.name: Chrono-Weaver
mage.mechanic: Controls temporal fields to slow enemies and accelerate ally cooldowns.
mage.silhouette: Slim support frame with floating chrono focus orbs
mage.vfx: Screen-space refraction temporal field + ground AoE decals

thief.name: Spell-Blade
thief.mechanic: Conjures and fires high-velocity aetherial daggers from mid-range.
thief.silhouette: Lean duelist with conjured dagger motes around the hands
thief.vfx: Aetherial dagger projectiles + blade trails (ribbon / GPUParticles3D)

warrior.name: Juggernaut
warrior.mechanic: Launches into the fray with steam-powered thrusters to scatter lines.
warrior.vfx: Steam / thruster GPUParticles3D + orange heat glow on cannons and cracks

mage.name: Thermite-Sage
mage.mechanic: Deploys overheating napalm charges and buffs ally weapons with fire.
mage.silhouette: Support frame with canister / charge launcher
mage.vfx: Fire / heat emission, napalm AoE ground decals, spark particles

thief.name: Scrap-Slinger
thief.mechanic: High-precision sniper utilizing heavily modified long-range aether rifles.
thief.silhouette: Lean marksman with a long rifle silhouette
thief.vfx: Muzzle flash + hitscan tracer + impact decals

warrior.name: Pack-Leader
warrior.mechanic: Mitigates damage by summoning spectral beasts; creates active stealth zones.
warrior.silhouette: Sturdy beastfolk with pelt/fur bulk (fake fur via shell/alpha cards)
warrior.vfx: Spectral beast summon VFX + stealth-zone ground decal

mage.name: Blood-Shaman
mage.mechanic: Siphons health from enemies in a designated area and redistributes it to allies.
mage.silhouette: Ritual support frame with totem / charms
mage.vfx: Health-siphon AoE drain decal + heal aura particles

thief.name: Shadow-Stalker
thief.mechanic: Pure stealth archetype featuring short-range blinks and high backstab criticals.
thief.vfx: Short-range blink VFX + backstab crit flash
